text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I approach the glass-walled room. Its modern, well-lit interior and visible safety equipment evoke an environment devoted to learning and innovation. Stepping inside, the bold R+D signage and the vibrant colors stimulate my mind. I am surrounded by displays of research, creativity, and technological exploration. Being here, I feel inspired and reflective, aware that I stand in a place where humans push the boundaries of understanding and seek harmony with intelligent machines.
